points.title: Galle Fort UNESCO World Heritage Site
points.description: Magnificent 52-hectare fortress with 14 bastions representing Asia's finest European colonial fortification and living heritage community.

points.title: Galle International Cricket Stadium
points.description: World's most scenic cricket venue between fort walls and ocean, hosting international matches since 1998.

points.title: Meeran Jumma Mosque
points.description: Beautiful 1904 mosque showcasing Victorian-Baroque Islamic architecture within the fort, serving historic Muslim community.

points.title: Dutch Reformed Church (Groote Kerk)
points.description: Historic baroque church from 1640 with unique Dutch gravestone floor, antique organ, and magnificent colonial architecture.

points.title: All Saints Anglican Church
points.description: Victorian Gothic church from 1871 with stunning stained glass, carved timber arches, and post-tsunami restoration.

points.title: St. Mary's Cathedral
points.description: Historic Catholic cathedral founded by Jesuit priests showcasing Portuguese colonial church architecture.

points.title: Sudharmalaya Buddhist Temple
points.description: Active Buddhist temple within fort walls offering meditation experiences and insight into Sri Lankan Buddhist traditions.

points.title: Galle Lighthouse
points.description: Iconic 27-meter lighthouse built in 1938 on Utrecht Bastion offering spectacular harbor and ocean views.

points.title: National Maritime Museum
points.description: Fascinating museum in 17th-century Dutch warehouse showcasing underwater archaeology from over 21 shipwreck sites.

points.title: Galle Harbor and Fish Market
points.description: Active commercial port and traditional fishing harbor demonstrating 2,000 years of maritime trading traditions.

points.title: Central Market (Dutch Market)
points.description: Historic market with 300-year-old columned roof offering fresh produce, spices, textiles, and authentic urban experiences.

points.title: Flag Rock Bastion
points.description: Historic Portuguese bastion transformed into premier sunset viewing point with spectacular ocean vistas.

points.title: Old Dutch Hospital Shopping Complex
points.description: Restored 18th-century colonial hospital transformed into premier boutique shopping and dining destination.

points.title: Galle Clock Tower
points.description: Victorian clock tower built in 1882 commemorating Queen Victoria's jubilee, standing as prominent fort landmark.

points.title: Point Utrecht Bastion
points.description: Strategic bastion housing the lighthouse with underground powder magazine and spectacular harbor views.

points.title: Star Bastion
points.description: Northwestern bastion offering sweeping ocean views and historical significance as one of the original Dutch fortifications.

points.title: Moon Bastion
points.description: Historic bastion overlooking cricket stadium with commanding views and original Dutch cannon emplacements.

points.title: Zwart Bastion
points.description: Harbor-facing bastion enlarged by Dutch in 1730 containing unexplored tunnels and strategic defensive positions.

points.title: Historical Mansion Museum
points.description: Private collection in Dutch-era townhouse showcasing antiques, gems, and colonial artifacts.

points.title: Shiva Temple (Galle)
points.description: One of the main Hindu Shiva temples on the island serving the Tamil community with ancient architectural features.
